creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
===>  Building package for pecl-judy-1.0.2_1
pkg-static: Warning: @exec is deprecated, please use @[pre|post][un]exec

see freebsd forum
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/54690/page-35

It installs with the port and poudriere but throws the same warning.
There is no pkg-plist and the Makefile contains no @exec or @unexec.
So I guess it is a portlint error.
